channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Middle East conflict disrupts shipping, raises costs for Pakistan’s trade
item.description: KARACHI: The ongoing military conflict in the Middle East and the temporary closure of the Strait of Hormuz has forced global shipping firms to take extra precautions for cargo and crew safety. Major ...

item.title: How to Observe the March Total Lunar Eclipse and Blood Moon
item.description: On Tuesday, a total lunar eclipse will transform the moon into a deep reddish-orange, commonly called a blood moon. This celestial event is visible across Asia, Australia, the Pacific Islands, and the...

item.title: Mahindra Fusion Fest 2026 Brings South African Music, Fashion and Art Together
item.description: The Mahindra Fusion Fest 2026 is set to take over the SunBet Arena in Pretoria on 7 March, promising a larger and more immersive experience than its previous edition. Following a successful 2025 festi...

item.title: Years of defence underinvestment leave UK exposed amid escalating Iran conflict
item.description: The article examines the United Kingdom’s constrained military position following the expansion of Donald Trump’s war against Iran to include a British base in Cyprus. It argues that years of underinv...

item.title: Atiku’s Son Adamu Resigns from Adamawa State Cabinet After Fintiri’s Defection
item.description: Alhaji Adamu Abubakar, son of former Vice President Atiku Abubakar, don resign from him position as Commissioner for Works and Energy Development for Adamawa State under Governor Ahmadu Fintiri. Dis r...

item.title: Adapting Careers in the Age of Artificial Intelligence
item.description: The rise of artificial intelligence (AI) is reshaping career paths across industries, prompting workers to rethink their professional strategies. Many younger employees, especially Gen Z, are gravitat...

item.title: Savannah Guthrie and Family Visit Home Following Mother Nancy Guthrie’s Disappearance
item.description: Savannah Guthrie, host of the “Today” show, returned to her mother Nancy Guthrie’s home outside Tucson, Arizona, with her sister Annie Guthrie and brother-in-law Tommaso Cioni on Monday, marking their...

item.title: Employment Court Rules on TSC Disciplinary Process, Awards Damages for Irregularities
item.description: The Employment and Labour Relations Court sitting in Kisumu recently delivered a mixed ruling in the case of Fred Apima Obita against the Teachers Service Commission (TSC) and other state agencies. Th...

item.title: Trump’s inconsistent statements on Iran war escalate regional tensions
item.description: US President Donald Trump’s statements about the ongoing conflict in Iran have been highly inconsistent, causing confusion both domestically and internationally. Since launching airstrikes that result...

item.title: Government Supports Biodegradable Bag Production to Fight Plastic Pollution
item.description: In Kagera Region, Tanzania, the government is strongly backing investors who produce biodegradable bags as part of a wider push to fight plastic pollution and promote eco-friendly packaging. Dr Festo ...

item.title: Efforts to Ensure Lenacapavir HIV Drug is Affordable for Indian Patients
item.description: Several Indian organisations and activists are challenging the patent claims of US pharmaceutical company Gilead Sciences to make Lenacapavir, a highly effective HIV prevention drug, accessible and af...

item.title: African Health Journalism Struggles Amid Funding Cuts and Rising Health Challenges
item.description: Health journalism for Africa is facing serious challenges at the moment, according to the Africa Health Media Trends Report 2026 launched in Nairobi by FINN Partners. The report, based on interviews w...

item.title: Iran clarifies conflict targets US and Israel, not Gulf neighbours
item.description: Iran don yan say e no dey fight any Gulf country, na US and Israel dem dey target. Seyed Abbas Araghchi, wey be Iranian foreign minister, talk say US don betray diplomacy by attacking Iran even as neg...

item.title: Total lunar eclipse visible across Australia in 2026
item.description: Australians are in for a treat this Tuesday night with a rare total lunar eclipse, commonly called a 'blood moon', which will be the only one visible from the country in 2026. During this event, the f...

item.title: Sindh Government Grants Official Holiday to Hindu Community for Holi
item.description: The Sindh government has officially declared March 3 and 4 as holidays for the Hindu community in celebration of Holi. The announcement was made by provincial spokesperson Sukhdev Hemnani, who also ex...

item.title: South Africans abroad report fears and disruptions amid Middle East conflict
item.description: South African citizens living across the Gulf region and parts of Asia are facing uncertainty and fear following a sudden escalation of conflict between the US, Israel, and Iran. The targeted strikes ...

item.title: California sea lions gather at Deep Bay beach on Vancouver Island ahead of herring run
item.description: Hundreds of California sea lions have temporarily gathered on the beach at Deep Bay, located on Vancouver Island across from Denman Island. According to David Rosen, a marine biologist with the UBC In...

item.title: Systemic Failures in Canada’s Drinking Water Supply for First Nations: Health and Governance Challenges
item.description: In January 2026, around 200 people evacuated from Kashechewan First Nation arrived in Kingston, Ontario, many with complex medical needs. Indigenous healthcare teams quickly set up a mobile clinic to ...

item.title: South African Government Engages UFS on Safety of Menstrual Hygiene Products
item.description: The South African Department of Women, Youth and Persons with Disabilities (DWYPD) has engaged the University of the Free State (UFS) following a peer-reviewed study that found endocrine-disrupting ch...

item.title: Manchester City Edge Past Leeds United at Elland Road
item.description: Manchester City waka go Elland Road dey face Leeds United without their main striker, Erling Haaland, wey dem injury during training. E no easy at all for dem as Leeds start strong, dey put City under...
